Package recoder.kit

Class MiscKit

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.MiscKit
public class MiscKit extends Object
This utility class provides queries, factory methods and transformations on abstract entities that do not fall into one of the abstraction categories (Types, Variables and so on).

One class of auxiliary methods deals with child-parent relations. There are queries to navigate trees upwards until a certain parent class is reached, most prominently getParentCompilationUnit(recoder.java.ProgramElement). A related query, contains(recoder.java.NonTerminalProgramElement, recoder.java.ProgramElement)checks the syntactical containment relation (is-equals-or-ancestor-of).

Some convenience tranformations allow to remove, prepend or append single childs. Since these transformations report their changes on this low level only, it is admissible to optimize change notifications by leaving the change history object null and notifying a broader change instead.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    append(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
    Transformation that appends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit.

    Transformation that appends the given Statement to the list in the given StatementBlock.

    checkParentLinks(ProgramElement root)
    Query that checks if all parent links are made valid in the given subtree; useful for debugging purposes.

    contains(NonTerminalProgramElement root, ProgramElement node)
    Query checking if a given non terminal is identical to or an ancestor of the given node.

    Factory method that creates a not yet collated reference qualifier from a qualified name.

    Returns the element in the cloned tree corresponding to the original node in the original tree.

    use UnitKit.getCompilationUnit instead

    Query returning the type declaration the given program element is contained within.

    Query returning the innermost scope defining element the given program element is contained within.

  • Method Details

    • createUncollatedReferenceQualifier

      public static UncollatedReferenceQualifier createUncollatedReferenceQualifier(ProgramFactory factory, String name)
      Factory method that creates a not yet collated reference qualifier from a qualified name. This can be a reference to a field or parameter or variable, or a reference to a package, an inner or outer or local type.
      Returns:
      a qualified reference with the given name; parent links of the reference are made valid.

    • contains

      public static boolean contains(NonTerminalProgramElement root, ProgramElement node)
      Query checking if a given non terminal is identical to or an ancestor of the given node. If any of the elements is null, there is no ancestor relation.
      Parameters:
      root - a non terminal that might be the ancestor of the given element.
      node - a program element that might be a descendant of (or identical to) the given non terminal.
      Returns:
      true, if the given root is an ancestor of the given node, false otherwise.

    • setName

      public static void setName(NamedProgramElement e, String name)
      Auxiliary transformation that sets the name of the specified element to the specified string, creating a proper identifier.
      Parameters:
      e - the element to name.
      name - the future element name.
      Since:
      0.63

    • rename

      @Deprecated public static Identifier rename(ChangeHistory ch, NamedProgramElement namedElement, String newName)
      Deprecated.
      replaced by Transformation.replace
      Transformation that renames a program element. If the new name is different from the old one, a new Identifier is created and replaces the old one.
      Parameters:
      namedElement - the element to be renamed; may not be null.
      newName - the new name for the element; may not be null and must denote a valid identifier name.
      ch - the change history (may be null).
      Returns:
      the new identifier if it has replaced the old one; the old identifier otherwise.

    • getParentCompilationUnit

      @Deprecated public static CompilationUnit getParentCompilationUnit(ProgramElement pe)
      Deprecated.
      use UnitKit.getCompilationUnit instead
      retrieves the compilation unit of the specified program element
      Parameters:
      pe - ProgramElement for which to get the CompilationUnit
      Returns:
      the CompilationUnit that contains the specified program element

    • getParentTypeDeclaration

      public static TypeDeclaration getParentTypeDeclaration(ProgramElement pe)
      Query returning the type declaration the given program element is contained within. Returns null, if the program element is not part of a type declaration, e.g. a CompilationUnit.
      Parameters:
      pe - a program element.
      Returns:
      the innermost type declaration containing pe, or null .

    • getScopeDefiningElement

      public static ScopeDefiningElement getScopeDefiningElement(ProgramElement pe)
      Query returning the innermost scope defining element the given program element is contained within. If the given program element is a scope defining element, it is returned.
      Parameters:
      pe - a program element.
      Returns:
      the innermost scope defining element type declaration equals pe or containing pe.

    • getParentMemberDeclaration

      public static MemberDeclaration getParentMemberDeclaration(ProgramElement pe)
      Query returning the member declaration the given program element is contained within. Returns null, if the program element is not part of a member declaration, e.g. a CompilationUnit.
      Parameters:
      pe - a program element.
      Returns:
      the innermost member declaration containing pe, or null .

    • checkParentLinks

      public static ProgramElement checkParentLinks(ProgramElement root)
      Query that checks if all parent links are made valid in the given subtree; useful for debugging purposes. Returns the first program element encountered that has an invalid parent link, or null if every element is linked correctly.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the subtree to check (is not checked itself).
      Returns:
      an descendant of root that has a bad parent link, or null if there is no such element.

    • remove

      @Deprecated public static void remove(ChangeHistory ch, ProgramElement child)
      Deprecated.
      replaced by Transformation.replace
      Transformation that removes a single child from its parent. This method conveniently computes the position of the child and handles the change history notification. The method can also handle compilation units properly, but otherwise assumes that the parent link is defined. This method is not very useful if the change history is left undefined, but will work nethertheless.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      child - the child to remove from its parent.

    • replace

      @Deprecated public static void replace(ChangeHistory ch, ProgramElement child, ProgramElement replacement)
      Deprecated.
      replaced by Transformation.replace
      Transformation that replaces a single child by a different one. This method performs the exchange and handles the change history notification. The method can also handle compilation units properly, but otherwise assumes that the parent link is defined. This method is not very useful if the change history is left undefined, but will work nethertheless.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      child - the child to remove from its parent.
      replacement - the child to replace its original (must be of appropriate type).

    • append

      public static void append(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
      Transformation that appends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit. No checks for redundancy or validity are performed.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      parent - the parent containing a list of childs to append to.
      child - the child to be appended to the list in the parent.

    • prepend

      public static void prepend(ChangeHistory ch, CompilationUnit parent, Import child)
      Transformation that prepends the given Import to the list in the given Compilation Unit. No checks for redundancy or validity are performed.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      parent - the parent containing a list of childs to prepend.
      child - the child to be prepended to the list in the parent.

    • append

      public static void append(ChangeHistory ch, StatementBlock parent, Statement child)
      Transformation that appends the given Statement to the list in the given StatementBlock. No checks for redundancy or vadility are performed.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      parent - the parent containing a list of childs to append to.
      child - the child to be appended to the list in the parent.

    • prepend

      public static void prepend(ChangeHistory ch, StatementBlock parent, Statement child)
      Transformation that prepends the given Statement to the list in the given StatementBlock. No checks for redundancy or vadility are performed.
      Parameters:
      ch - the change history to notify (may be null).
      parent - the parent containing a list of childs to prepend.
      child - the child to be prepended to the list in the parent.

    • unindent

      public static void unindent(ProgramElement root)
      Removes relative and absolute indentation information from the given tree.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the subtree.

    • mapClones

      public static void mapClones(ProgramElement originalRoot, ProgramElement cloneRoot, Map<ProgramElement,ProgramElement> map)
      Adds object mappings from original to cloned versions for each node in a tree to an existing map.
      Parameters:
      originalRoot - the root of the original tree.
      cloneRoot - the root of the cloned tree.
      map - the map in which to put the node pairs.

    • getClone

      public static ProgramElement getClone(ProgramElement original, ProgramElement originalRoot, ProgramElement cloneRoot)
      Returns the element in the cloned tree corresponding to the original node in the original tree. This method will report the original element if it does not occur within the first tree, or if the second tree is smaller than the first one.

      If there are many queries for clones, it is more efficient to instantiate an own mapping using a hash table and the mapClones(recoder.java.ProgramElement, recoder.java.ProgramElement, java.util.Map<recoder.java.ProgramElement, recoder.java.ProgramElement>)auxiliary.

      Parameters:
      original - the element to find the corresponding clone for.
      originalRoot - the root of the original tree.
      cloneRoot - the root of the cloned tree.
